command.ship.label: /ship — Full Feature Delivery
command.ship.description: Plan → Implement → Verify → Audit → Human push-gate

steps.caption: User invokes /ship with a feature description
Orchestrator consults questioning.md to sharpen scope
Dispatch safe-planner for a rollback-ready plan
Emit human push-gate checkpoint — nothing ships until approval

command.tdd.label: /tdd — Test-Driven Development
command.tdd.description: Red → Green → Refactor, with the Iron Law of "test first"

steps.caption: User invokes /tdd for a new behavior
@-includes gates.md (Iron Law: no code before a failing test)
Plan the test surface and rollback
Write failing test → minimal impl → refactor
qa-agent confirms coverage and no regressions

command.bug.label: /bug — Trace, Diagnose, Fix, Validate
command.bug.description: 4-phase systematic debugging, stops at 3+ failed fixes

steps.caption: Dispatch bug-fix: trace flow → identify root cause
Apply narrow fix at root cause
qa-agent confirms symptom gone, no regressions

command.qa-loop.label: /qa-loop — Iterative Audit-and-Fix
command.qa-loop.description: Revision gate: audit → fix → re-audit until clean (max 3 iterations)

steps.caption: Revision gate: loop or escalate per gates.md

command.deploy-validate.label: /deploy-validate — Self-Healing Deployment
command.deploy-validate.description: Pre-deploy QA → deploy → smoke test → human prod approval

steps.caption: Post-deploy smoke test on prod URL
Final human approval before marking success

command.redesign.label: /redesign — Collaborative UI Redesign
command.redesign.description: Capture → brainstorm → generate mockups → implement → verify

command.autoloop.label: /autoloop — Autonomous optimization loop that iteratively improves code until it meets a tar
command.autoloop.description: Autonomous optimization loop that iteratively improves code until it meets a target metric. Based on Karpathy's autoresearch architecture: hypothesis -> modify -> test -> commit/revert.

steps.caption: Standalone skill/utility — no subagent dispatch in the core path

command.autotest.description: Autonomous live testing agent that systematically tests a web application via Playwright. Reads a briefing for the test plan (URL, credentials, test cases) and executes each test, recording pass/fail results. Reusable across any web app.

command.nano-banana.label: /nano-banana — Generates AI images using the nano-banana CLI (Gemini 3.1 Flash default, Pro ava
command.nano-banana.description: Generates AI images using the nano-banana CLI (Gemini 3.1 Flash default, Pro available). Handles multi-resolution (512-4K), aspect ratios, reference images for style transfer, green screen workflow for transparent assets, cost tracking, and exact dimension control. Use when asked to "generate an image", "create a sprite", "make an asset", "generate artwork", or any image generation task for UI mockups, game assets, videos, or marketing materials.
